title: Catherine Mckalip-Thompson
compiled_truth: Catherine Mckalip-Thompson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-11-15 to 2001-12-03), Catherine Mckalip-Thompson sent 14 and received 101 emails, totalling 115 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (11), [April Hrach](people/april-hrach) (4), [Kelly Brodbeck](people/kelly-brodbeck) (4), [Mark Fillinger](people/mark-fillinger) (4), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (4).
